name: spatial_manifest
description: World surface descriptor. Describes what is reachable and actionable at a spatial address. The HTTP/0.9 response for space.

fields.name: world_id
fields.description: Canonical dworld:// URI of this world

fields.name: geometry
fields.description: URL or IPFS hash of primary 3D geometry asset

fields.name: surface
fields.description: Named actions available to any Body that enters

fields.name: agent
fields.description: HTTPS endpoint of the governing AI agent

fields.name: payment
fields.description: Payment address for access or metered actions
